label: Trait
description: Defines a pawn personality or biological trait and one or more degree-specific effects.

degreeDatas.label: Degree datas
degreeDatas.description: One or more degree-level entries defining the effects of this trait at each degree.

conflictingTraits.label: Conflicting traits
conflictingTraits.description: TraitDefs that cannot coexist with this trait on the same pawn.

exclusionTags.label: Exclusion tags
exclusionTags.description: String tags shared with conflicting traits. Any two traits sharing a tag cannot be assigned to the same pawn.

conflictingPassions.label: Conflicting passions
conflictingPassions.description: SkillDefs for which this trait prevents a pawn from having a passion.

forcedPassions.label: Forced passions
forcedPassions.description: SkillDefs for which this trait forces a pawn to have a passion.

requiredWorkTypes.label: Required work types
requiredWorkTypes.description: WorkTypeDefs the pawn must be capable of for this trait to be assigned during generation.

requiredWorkTags.label: Required work tags
requiredWorkTags.description: WorkTags flags that must be enabled for the pawn to receive this trait during generation.

disabledWorkTypes.label: Disabled work types
disabledWorkTypes.description: WorkTypeDefs permanently disabled for pawns with this trait.

disabledWorkTags.label: Disabled work tags
disabledWorkTags.description: WorkTags flags permanently disabled for pawns with this trait.

disableHostilityFromAnimalType.label: Disable hostility from animal type
disableHostilityFromAnimalType.description: If set, animals of this type will not become hostile toward pawns with this trait.

disableHostilityFromFaction.label: Disable hostility from faction
disableHostilityFromFaction.description: FactionDef whose members will not become hostile toward pawns with this trait.

canBeSuppressed.label: Can be suppressed
canBeSuppressed.description: If false, this trait cannot be suppressed by conflicting traits or other suppression mechanics.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight for random trait selection. Higher values make the trait more common.

commonalityFemale.label: Commonality (female)
commonalityFemale.description: Commonality override for female pawns. Uses the base commonality when negative.

allowOnHostileSpawn.label: Allow on hostile spawn
allowOnHostileSpawn.description: If false, this trait is not assigned to pawns spawned as hostile NPCs.

basic-trait.label: Basic trait
basic-trait.description: A single-degree trait with one degreeDatas entry.
